nasb.text: This is the way of an adulterous woman: She eats and wipes her mouth, And says, “I have done no wrong.”

esv.text: This is the way of an adulteress: she eats and wipes her mouth and says, “I have done no wrong.”

cnv.text: 淫婦的行徑是這樣的： 她吃了，把嘴一抹， 就說：‘我沒有作錯事。’

ccb.text: 淫妇的道是这样： 她吃完就擦擦嘴， 说，“我没有做坏事。”

csbs.text: 淫妇的行径是这样的： 她吃完，把自己的嘴一擦， 就说：“我没有做坏事。”
